docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, TRACY
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, TRACY
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-31-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-07-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, TRACY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMCAST $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,930.00, "THE COURT FINDS LIABILITY AND AWARDS LIMITED DAMAGES FOR THE AUGUST 2015 AND 2016 SERVICE INTERRUPTIONS BY DEFENDANT. THE COURT DOES NOT CREDIT CONTRACTUAL TERMS NOT CLEARLY PRESENTED TO THE CUSTOMER AT THE TIME OF SIGNATURE ON THE SERVICE AGREEMENT, BUT NOR DOES THE COURT CREDIT ALL OF PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED DAMAGES FROM LOSS OF BUSINESS. THE COURT WAS TROUBLED THAT DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTIVES IN COURT COULD NOT SPEAK TO THE DETAILS OF SERVICE INTERRUPTION TO PLAINTIFF, AND THAT EARLIER COMCAST REPRESENTATIVES DID NOT RESOLVE SERVICE ISSUES & AFTER COMPENSATION FOR PLAINTIFF'S REPEATED REQUESTS BY PLAINTIFF", PER PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF USING (SC-150) FORM FOR RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, TRACY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED JUL-15-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY CHAN, TRACY COMCAST
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,200.00 FILED BY CHAN, TRACY AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LINDA ROE--REGIONAL SUPERVISOR AND DEREK DRISDALE--OPERATIONS MANGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
